meaning: n.悦耳而柔和的记号,柔声音栓adj.[乐]温柔的
examples: This is where money is made and there's little time for la dolce vita.
Messrs. Dolce and Gabbana decided to buy the D&G license back six years ago to improve its positioning.
The Italians have an old saying, "Il dolce far niente."
The people outside the Dolce Vita say they are just citizens ready to protect their families.
There are other multi-brand shoe stores such as Topps, Tip Top Shoes and Dolce Vita.
